Young Red Dragon can't reach Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster with Bite (distance 30ft, range 10ft).
Young Red Dragon can't reach Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster with Bite (distance 30ft, range 10ft).
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 9 falling damage. HP: 169/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 15] HIT! 12 damage. Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster HP: 55/67
→ Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 8 vs DC 10]
Young Red Dragon attacks Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 15] CRITICAL HIT! 30 damage. Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster HP: 25/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 15] HIT! 17 damage. Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster HP: 8/67
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster with Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 15] HIT! 13 damage. Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
